questions.question: What was the sign of God's covenant with Noah after the Great Flood?

How many days and nights did the rain last during the Great Flood?

Who was the giant that David defeated with a stone and a slingshot?
What happened to Lot's wife when she looked back at the destruction of Sodom and Gomorrah?
options: She was turned into a pillar of salt
She was turned into a pillar of fire
She was swallowed by the earth
questions.answer: She was turned into a pillar of salt

questions.question: What Old Testament prophet was swallowed by a great fish?

What was the name of the man Jesus raised from the dead after he had been in the tomb for four days?

What was the name of the place where Jesus was crucified?
Which judge of Israel defeated the Midianites with only 300 men, each carrying a trumpet and a jar with a torch?

options: Seven loaves and a few small fish

questions.question: What did the Apostle Peter do for a living before he followed Jesus?

What happened to the Temple curtain when Jesus died on the cross?

options: A baby wrapped in swaddling clothes
Mary and Joseph preparing to flee
questions.answer: A baby wrapped in swaddling clothes

questions.question: What part of his body did Jacob injure when wrestling with an angel?

What animal spoke to the prophet Balaam?

What did Jesus miraculously heal in the man born blind?
What part of the Bible contains the story of the Tower of Babel?
Which King had a dream of a statue made of four different materials, which Daniel interpreted?
Who was the judge renowned for his great strength, which was tied to his hair?
What did the people of Israel ask Samuel for that displeased God?
options: A king to rule over them
questions.answer: A king to rule over them

questions.question: What famous passage did Jesus preach on the side of a mountain, beginning with the Beatitudes?
What food was miraculously provided to Elijah by ravens while he hid by the Brook Cherith?
What was the name of the city Jesus grew up in?
What did the woman with the issue of blood do to be healed by Jesus?
options: She touched the edge of his garment
questions.answer: She touched the edge of his garment

questions.question: What did God change Jacob's name to?

What was the last plague in Egypt?
What was the name of the book written by the Apostle John while he was exiled on the island of Patmos?
In the story of the Good Samaritan, who was the first person to pass by the injured man and ignore him?
What famous phrase did Jesus use to describe John the Baptist's role?
options: A voice crying in the wilderness
questions.answer: A voice crying in the wilderness

questions.question: What happened to the city of Sodom and Gomorrah?
options: They were struck by fire and brimstone
They were overthrown by a foreign army
questions.answer: They were struck by fire and brimstone

questions.question: Which woman was the mother of Isaac?

What was the name of the well-known Pharisee who came to Jesus at night to ask him questions?

options: He drove them out with a whip
He healed the sick among them
questions.answer: He drove them out with a whip

What did Jesus use to cleanse the temple area?
Who was the younger brother of Moses?

Which Old Testament book is known as the book of the Law?
What did King David do to the captured city of Jerusalem?
options: He gave it back to the Jebusites
